findings.title: Security incident notice is too slow
findings.clause: thirty (30) days after Processor determines that notice is legally required
findings.rationale: Thirty days is too slow for breach notice and the trigger should not wait until Processor decides legal notice is required.

findings.title: Subprocessor changes need prior notice and objection rights
findings.clause: may engage subprocessors without prior notice
findings.rationale: Customer should get prior notice of subprocessors and a practical objection mechanism.

findings.title: Cross-border transfer mechanism is missing
findings.clause: transfer Personal Data globally ... no additional transfer terms
findings.rationale: Global transfers need a transfer mechanism such as standard contractual clauses where restricted-transfer rules apply.
